$schema_description: Scene/shot list schema for FFmpeg-assembled property videos. Each scene is rendered in 'order' sequence. This file defines the schema and includes one realistic 5-scene example for a typical property video.

schema.listing_id: string - Pintag listing ID this video is generated for

scenes.order: integer - 1-based position of this scene in the final video
scenes.image_or_clip: string - path or URL to the source listing photo or video clip used for this scene
scenes.duration_seconds: number - length of this scene in seconds
scenes.caption_text: string - on-screen caption/lower-third text overlaid on this scene
scenes.voiceover_line: string - TTS voiceover script line spoken during this scene
scenes.transition: string - transition effect into the next scene, e.g. 'crossfade', 'cut', 'slide-left'

scenes.voiceover_line: Welcome to this beautifully maintained three-bedroom villa in the heart of Sisattanak.
The open-plan living area offers natural light throughout the day, perfect for family gatherings.
A fully equipped modern kitchen makes this home move-in ready.
The master bedroom includes a private en-suite bathroom and ample closet space.

scenes.caption_text: Contact Pintag to Schedule a Viewing
scenes.voiceover_line: Interested in this property? Contact the listing agent through Pintag today to schedule a viewing.
